title: phrygilanthus puracensis
intro: Phrygilanthus puracensis, also known as the golden trumpet vine, is a tropical flowering plant native to Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Phrygilanthus puracensis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Phrygilanthus puracensis can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis.
